completed_tasks.name: Phase 5 plan artifacts created and validated
completed_tasks.details: Created 05-01-PLAN.md, 05-02-PLAN.md, and 05-03-PLAN.md. All three passed frontmatter.validate --schema plan and verify.plan-structure.

remaining_tasks.name: Write failing dashboard aggregate tests for DASH-01 through DASH-04
Build the root dashboard metrics and renewal-risk slice
Add spend distributions and secondary count overview
Run final automated and source backstop gates
Verify the dashboard visually in browser

human_actions_pending.action: Approve the final dashboard visual checkpoint in Plan 05-03 Task 2 after implementation and automated gates pass.
human_actions_pending.context: The UI contract requires desktop/mobile browser inspection for first-viewport hierarchy, compact operations layout, CSS bar distributions, and absence of mutation controls.

decisions.decision: Phase 5 execution is split into three sequential waves: aggregate TDD, dashboard UI, final verification.
decisions.rationale: The aggregate contract is the load-bearing boundary for DASH-01 through DASH-04; the root UI depends on it; final visual verification depends on both.

decisions.decision: No schema push or migration task is planned for Phase 5.
decisions.rationale: The plan set modifies only dashboard query/UI files and final verification artifacts; it does not modify src/db/schema.ts, drizzle/*.sql, or drizzle/meta/*.json.

decisions.decision: Dashboard totals use stored derived fields only.
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 froze USD snapshots at payment time. Phase 5 must aggregate space.amountUsd and childAccount.monthlyAmountUsd without live FX recomputation.

decisions.decision: No chart package or new dependency is planned.
decisions.rationale: 05-UI-SPEC requires existing shadcn/Radix primitives and CSS bar lists for distributions.

uncommitted_files: Many pre-existing modified/untracked files from earlier phases are present; run git status before editing and do not revert unrelated changes.
next_action: Run $gsd-execute-phase 05. If executing manually, start with .planning/phases/05-dashboard-overview/05-01-PLAN.md Task 1.
context_notes: Phase 5 is planned but not executed. The root dashboard should be built over getDashboardOverview(db, today?) with stored-field aggregation, not live FX recomputation. The checkout is dirty from prior phase work; treat unrelated changes as user/workflow-owned.
